pages.text: Crop conditions can be $(bad)Poor$(), $(item)OK$(), or $(2)Ideal$(). Tobacco responds to light, temperature, rain exposure, and general environment.

General advice:$(br2)- Strong sunlight is good$(br)- Warm conditions are usually better than cold$(br)- Too much rain hurts quality$(br)- Stable outdoor growth is usually better than cramped indoor growth
Use $(thing)/tobacconist debug$() while looking at a tobacco crop to see what is helping or hurting it.
